headline: CAP Theorem
description: The CAP theorem (Eric Brewer, 2000; formally proven by Gilbert & Lynch, 2002) states: a distributed system can guarantee at most two of: Consistency (all nodes see same data), Availability (every request gets a response), Partition Tolerance (system works despite network partitions). Since partitions are inevitable, you must choose between C and A.

citation.name: Distributed Systems Consistency: From CAP to CRDTs (2025 Survey)
citation.author: multiple
